characters.appearance: A young adult male with a medium build and fair complexion. He has short, curly brown hair and a short beard and mustache.
characters.wardrobe: A plain black crew-neck t-shirt and white wired earphones.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: 'I am... very good in... working.' ['I am... very good in... working.']
Character A says: ऐसे अटक-अटक कर English बोलने से interview कैसे clear होगा? [How will you clear an interview speaking English hesitantly like this?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by demonstrating a relatable English speaking mistake.
- Highlights the pain point of hesitating and feeling stuck during important moments like interviews.
- Sets up the need for a practical learning solution.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English बोलने में डर लगता है?
Download Supernova
Interview Practice
'I am... very good in... working.'

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Supernova के AI tutor के साथ रोज़ practice करो। [Practice daily with Supernova's AI tutor.]
Character A says: 'I have excellent problem-solving skills.' ['I have excellent problem-solving skills.']
Character A says: देखा? बिना डरे, एकदम perfect! [See? Without fear, absolutely perfect!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova's AI tutor as the practical solution for daily practice.
- Demonstrates a confident, corrected English sentence to show progress.
- Ends on a warm, encouraging note to build user confidence.
